{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"acceptance criterion 1 must name a concrete, boundary-defined implementation slice distinct from the sibling 'part 2' child: This is a child of ddx-53df5e2f explicitly scoped as 'part 1 of 2,' but the AC never states which of the parent's four proposed-fix steps (importer implementation, Migrator interface wiring, bead_migrate.go CLI flags, removal of deprecated JSONL write) belong to this child versus its sibling. AC item 1 just restates 'implement the first bounded slice of the parent bead' — a self-referential placeholder, not a scope boundary. A competent agent given only this bead body cannot pick a defensible stopping point without guessing, risking either duplicate work with the sibling child or leaving a half-wired Migrator implementation. Separately, 3 of 4 prior attempts (2026-07-07 and twice on 2026-07-08) report the mandatory `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./...` gate blocked by a pre-existing, unrelated failure in TestWork_WatchKillingWorkerReapsProviderChildWithin5s (provider-orphan stub timeout), not caused by this bead's scope. No note or reopen event clears that blocker, so per stale-blocker precedence it stands as current. Both issues need operator input: (1) an explicit description of what part-1 covers vs part-2, and (2) either a fix to the flaky repo-wide test or a scoped test gate for this slice so the child isn't perpetually un-landable through no fault of its own implementation.","fingerprint":"e56fb0c130933820e68e6481932d0bc66d8805a66efe8a7ef014f527713caee1","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"e56fb0c130933820e68e6481932d0bc66d8805a66efe8a7ef014f527713caee1"}

verification_command passed: cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... ./cmd/... -run 'Migrate|Importer|ToAxon'
rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... ./cmd/... -run 'Migrate|Importer|ToAxon'

reason: Parent bead ddx-53df5e2f was decomposed twice, concurrently. The first
(meaningful) decomposition on 2026-07-04 split the parent into three
properly parent/dep-wired children:
  - ddx-55a16aef "Implement JSONL->Postgres importer apply path"
    (adds cli/internal/bead/import_postgres.go using axonStore.Create +
    axonStore.Apply; closed, commit 3450e569c)
  - ddx-ff9300f9 "Add importer dry-run, verification, and attachment
    migration" (deps: ddx-55a16aef; closed, commit bd749d3ad)
  - ddx-b9884139 "Wire bead migrate to the real Axon importer flags"
    (deps: ddx-55a16aef, ddx-ff9300f9; replaces ErrDeprecated with the real
    importer result and wires --to-axon --dry-run/--apply/--verify in
    cli/cmd/bead_migrate.go; closed, commit 87df0e488)

All three are status=closed with commits already in this branch's history
(confirmed via `git log` on cli/internal/bead/import_postgres.go,
cli/internal/bead/migrator.go, cli/cmd/bead_migrate.go). Together they
satisfy every acceptance criterion listed on parent ddx-53df5e2f (importer
core, idempotency, extras/event-ordering preservation, attachment
migration, dry-run/verify, and CLI flag wiring).

A second, unrelated "deterministic fallback split" ran later the same day
(triggered by a decomposition-hook dispatch error, per the
preclaim-decompose-routing event on ddx-53df5e2f) and produced this bead
(ddx-cfb5f559, "part 1") plus ddx-3d96c6f9 ("part 2") with vague,
non-overlapping-with-reality AC text ("Implement the first/remaining
bounded slice of the parent bead"). This bead is that vacuous duplicate:
its named scope has no content beyond what the real decomposition above
already implemented and merged. There is no remaining code to write.

Verified in this pass:
- `go build ./...` is clean.
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... ./cmd/... -run 'Migrate|Importer|ToAxon'`
  passes in full (TestImporter_DryRun_CountsOnly,
  TestImporter_Apply_WritesToPostgres, TestImporter_Apply_Idempotent_OnReRun,
  TestImporter_PreservesExtras, TestImporter_PreservesEventOrdering,
  TestImporter_MigratesAttachments, TestImporter_Verify_DetectsDrift,
  TestImporter_Verify_RoundTripPassesOnCleanImport,
  TestMigrator_MigrateToAxon_ReturnsImporterResult,
  TestBeadMigrate_ToAxonDryRunRoutesToImporter,
  TestBeadMigrate_ToAxonApplyRoutesToImporter,
  TestBeadMigrate_ToAxonVerifyRoutesToImporter, among others, all green).
- `cli/internal/bead/migrator.go`'s MigrateToAxon no longer returns
  ErrDeprecated; it delegates to the real importer
  (m.store.migrateToAxonWithOptions).

Note: an unrelated, pre-existing failure exists in the unfiltered
`cd cli && go test ./...` run (TestWork_WatchKillingWorkerReapsProviderChildWithin5s
in cmd, an orphan-process-reaping test unrelated to bead migration/import
and dependent on subprocess/signal behavior in this sandbox). It is out of
this bead's scope and untouched by this pass; the verification_command
above is scoped to the packages and tests relevant to this bead's actual
subject matter (JSONL->Postgres migration/import), all of which pass.
